description: Project stage-by-stage process feedback; no template changes apply until explicitly approved by project lead.

entries.after: Strict-scope project brief with explicit in/out boundaries
entries.reasoning: Early explicit no-scope-creep wording reduced rework during build.
Platform differences were a real delivery blocker; surfacing this in discovery was valuable.

entries.after: Explicit pre/post/error contracts and decision tables
entries.reasoning: Reduced ambiguity around error handling and policy enforcement.
Improved auditability and smoother stage-5 verification.

entries.before: Task list without initial task and chronicle links
entries.after: Task list with initial task first and one chronicle ID per task
entries.reasoning: Made build accountability explicit before coding restarted.

entries.after: Per-task implementation decisions with evidence references
entries.reasoning: Preserved why-decisions and reduced hidden logic drift.

entries.after: Unified runtime with cross-platform dependency path
entries.reasoning: Most stable approach across supported environments.

entries.after: Explicit verification checklist aligned with requirements
entries.reasoning: Made pass/fail criteria visible and reviewable.

entries.after: Anchored mapping with improved output expansion
entries.reasoning: Improved readability and expected visual behavior.

entries.after: Explicit artifact completion and feedback logging checks
entries.reasoning: Ensures process closes with reusable governance learnings.
